title: retatrutide patient-facing interface, branded report rendering and controlled conversation workflow baseline
commit_message: Add Certiaura Build 0044 retatrutide patient-facing interface, branded report rendering and controlled conversation workflow baseline
integrated_capabilities: transactional Project Genesis import and Master Asset Register reconciliation
lessons_carried_forward: PowerShell scripts are ASCII-only and parsed under Windows PowerShell 5.1
Variable-cardinality pipelines are array-normalised before Count or indexing
Generated repository text is UTF-8 without BOM, LF, no trailing whitespace, one final newline
Both Git whitespace checks run before commit
Cleanup and OneDrive restart complete before success is declared
Validator scope is derived from exact manifest paths and Build Provenance, never numeric filename substrings

correction.issue: Post-import validator selected unrelated historical assets whose UAI serial contained 000044
correction.root_cause: Substring matching of 0044 was used as a proxy for build ownership
correction.repository_effect: None; failure occurred only in the temporary synthetic repository
correction.corrective_action: Resolve exact owned files from Asset Intent Manifest and CERT-BUILD-0044 provenance
correction.preventive_control: Build validators and tests must not infer ownership from filename substrings
